description_long: This is a lush potted plant featuring broad, glossy green leaves and several striking red, heart-shaped flowers with prominent yellow spadices, characteristic of the Anthurium genus. The foliage is dense and layered, with leaves of varying sizes and some showing natural curling or slight imperfections, adding to its realism. The plant is housed in a simple, cylindrical pot with a muted olive-green color and a matte finish, lacking any visible decorative patterns. The flowers rise above the foliage on slender stems, creating a visually dynamic arrangement. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, well-maintained plant suitable for decorative purposes. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A vibrant Anthurium potted plant with glossy green leaves and red, heart-shaped flowers in a plain olive-green cylindrical pot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense foliage and several prominent red flowers rising above the leaves, with the pot mostly obscured by leaves.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the broad, overlapping leaves and displays more of the pot's surface, with flowers visible at varying heights.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the plant's layered leaf structure and the cylindrical pot, with fewer flowers visible from this angle.
description_view_3: This angle shows a balanced display of both leaves and flowers, with the pot's plain surface clearly visible at the base.
